# Virginia budget includes teacher raises and data center tax shifts

**TL;DR:** Virginia's state budget approval includes teacher pay increases and changes to data center taxation.

The Virginia General Assembly has approved a new state budget that includes teacher salary increases and modifications to the tax treatment of data centers. The budget represents legislative priorities around education funding and economic development policy. These changes will affect how state education budgets and business incentives are structured going forward.

**Why it matters:** Teacher raises impact Chesterfield County Schools' ability to compete for qualified educators, while data center tax changes may influence tech business investment and county tax revenue.

[Read the source at Google News: Virginia Government →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
